fragility_points: A sharp downside move before Monday noon ET could compress the cushion quickly.
Exchange-specific or microstructure noise matters more because settlement is a single minute.
key_assumptions: No major downside macro or crypto-specific shock arrives before Monday noon ET.
Binance remains a stable and representative settlement venue.
BTC does not rapidly lose its current buffer versus 68000.
main_logical_chain: Verify the exact contract mechanics and source of truth.
Check Binance directly to measure the current buffer over 68000.
Assess whether plausible near-term catalysts are strong enough to erase that buffer before the exact settlement minute.
Conclude YES remains the base case but trim confidence below the market because narrow-timestamp crypto contracts are fragile.
main_thesis: BTC is likely to stay above 68000 on the relevant Binance noon ET minute on April 20, but the market is somewhat overconfident because this is a narrow single-minute crypto settlement.
quote_anchors: Binance BTC/USDT 1-minute candle for 12:00 in the ET timezone
source_quality_view: High confidence in settlement mechanics and current venue price; only medium confidence in independent forward catalyst coverage.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract resolves on one exact minute, so intraday volatility or a late selloff can still produce NO.
Crypto can move multiple percent quickly, especially around macro or weekend risk-off moves.
strongest_supports: Binance BTCUSDT spot checked near 74222, leaving roughly an 8% cushion above 68000.
Recent Binance daily closes were also above the strike.
Only six days remain, so absent a shock inertia favors YES.
timing_relevance: The key window is now through Monday, April 20 at 12:00 PM ET / 16:00 UTC, with weekend and Monday-morning downside catalysts most relevant.
unresolved_ambiguities: No highly specific independent catalyst source materially changed the view during this run.
The next six days may still contain unobserved macro or crypto-specific headline risk.
what_would_change_view: A rapid drop toward the low-70k or 68k area, a clear macro risk-off shock, or a crypto/Binance-specific negative event would push the estimate down.
